RemoveIpGroupFromIpSet.ipGroupId: The ID of the IP address group.
RemoveIpGroupFromIpSet.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
RemoveIpGroupFromIpSet.ipSetIds: IDs of the IP sets to remove. A maximum of 5 IDs can be specified per request.
